abilities.description: Reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature or planeswalker card, put it into your hand. Otherwise, you may put it on the bottom of your library.
Distribute three +1/+1 counters among up to three target creatures.
abilities.target_prompt: Select up to three target creatures you control

abilities.description: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a creature or planeswalker spell, target opponent gets two poison counters."
